assessment_objectives.objective: personnel or roles to be alerted in the event of an event logging process failure are identified.
types of event logging process failures for which alert will be generated are defined.
organizational personnel or roles are alerted in the event of an audit logging process failure within an organization-defined time period.
the time period for organizational personnel or roles receiving audit logging process failure alerts is defined.
additional actions to be taken in the event of an audit logging process failure are defined.
organizational personnel or roles are alerted in the event of an audit logging process failure within <A.03.03.04.ODP[01]: time period>.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: near real time or as soon as practicable upon discovery

assessment_objectives.objective: the following additional actions are taken: <A.03.03.04.ODP[02]: additional actions>.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: document the failure and resolution, troubleshoot, repair/restart the audit logging process, and report as incident if applicable
